# In The Fifty – Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
"In The Fifty" is a business that sells US-made products through social media platforms like TikTok.
This is an Astro + Vite website serving as the brand's online presence and product showcase.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Astro (with Vite as the build tool)
- **Styling:** CSS / Tailwind (if added)
- **Language:** TypeScript / JavaScript

## Project Goals
- Showcase US-made products
- Drive traffic from TikTok and other social media
- Provide shop/contact information

## Coding Guidelines
- Use Astro components for all UI elements
- Keep components modular and reusable
- Follow US-made branding: patriotic, bold, trustworthy
- Optimize for mobile-first (most visitors come from social media on mobile)
